mapper.select: SELECT m.code AS menu_code, BOOL_OR(pm.edit_yn = 'Y') AS can_edit, BOOL_OR(pm.delete_yn = 'Y') AS can_delete FROM user_organizations uo JOIN org_permissions op ON op.organization_id = uo.organization_id AND op.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN permission_menus pm ON pm.permission_id = op.permission_id AND pm.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN menus m ON m.id = pm.menu_id AND m.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE uo.user_id = #{userId} AND uo.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY m.code

SELECT mg.id AS group_id, mg.code AS group_code, mg.name AS group_name, mg.icon AS group_icon, mg.sort_order AS group_sort_order, m.id, m.code, m.name, m.path, m.icon, m.sort_order, m.is_visible FROM menu_groups mg LEFT JOIN menus m ON m.group_id = mg.id AND m.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE mg.deleted_at IS NULL AND mg.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY mg.sort_order ASC, m.sort_order ASC
